elements.original_description: A simple white arrow pointing diagonally upward to the right on a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon, a simple white arrow pointing diagonally upward to the right, centered on a pure white background, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, sharp edges, simple and elegant design, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

elements.original_description: A lightbulb icon with colorful rays emanating from it, centered on a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon, a lightbulb icon with bright, vibrant, colorful rays emanating outward from it, centered on a pure white background, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, sharp edges, simple and modern design, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
